articles.title: Zero-day exploit completely defeats default Windows 11 BitLocker protections
articles.content: It's not entirely clear how the exploit works. Microsoft says it's investigating.
articles.titleZh: 零日漏洞完全击败默认的Windows 11 BitLocker保护
articles.contentZh: 目前尚不完全清楚漏洞是如何运作的。微软表示正在进行调查。

articles.title: Cisco announces record revenue and 4,000 layoffs in the same day
articles.content: Layoffs are "not a savings-driven restructure," CFO says.
articles.titleZh: 思科在同一天宣布创纪录的收入和4000次裁员
articles.contentZh: 首席财务官表示，裁员“不是由储蓄驱动的重组”。

articles.title: Linux bitten by second severe vulnerability in as many weeks
articles.content: Production-version patches are coming online and should be installed pronto.
articles.titleZh: Linux在多周内被第二次严重漏洞咬伤
articles.contentZh: 生产版补丁即将上线，应立即安装。

articles.title: Chaos erupts as cyberattack disrupts learning platform Canvas amid finals
articles.content: Across the country, schools and colleges postpone year-end tests.
articles.titleZh: 随着网络攻击在决赛中扰乱学习平台Canvas ，混乱爆发
articles.contentZh: 在全国范围内，学校和学院推迟了年终考试。

articles.title: LG will release the first 1000Hz, 1080p gaming monitor this year
articles.content: If you just can't choose between refresh rate and resolution, LG's next gaming monitor could solve your problem, as the UltraGear 25G590B monitor is the first one announced that will be capable of a native 1000Hz refresh rate at 1,920 x 1,080 resolution. So far, the 1,000Hz models we've seen have only been capable of […]
articles.titleZh: LG今年将发布首款1000Hz、1080p游戏显示器
articles.contentZh: 如果您无法在刷新率和分辨率之间做出选择， LG的下一款游戏显示器可以解决您的问题，因为UltraGear 25G590B显示器是第一款能够以1,920 x 1,080分辨率实现本机1000Hz刷新率的显示器。到目前为止，我们看到的1000Hz型号只能[…]

articles.title: Volvo teases a new affordable EV to replace discontinued EX30
articles.content: Volvo's compact, quirky EX30 had a lot of problems when it was first released. Tariffs essentially erased its affordability, making it more expensive to own, and a battery recall made it dangerous to park indoors. But its discontinuation didn't spell the end of Volvo's efforts to sell more affordable electric models. In fact, the Swedish […]
articles.titleZh: 沃尔沃推出全新价格实惠的电动汽车，以取代已停产的EX30
articles.contentZh: 沃尔沃紧凑、古怪的EX30在首次发布时有很多问题。关税基本上抹去了它的可负担性，使其拥有更昂贵，而电池召回使在室内停车变得危险。但它的停产并不意味着沃尔沃销售更实惠的电动车型努力的结束。事实上，瑞典人[…]
